title: osbertia bartlettii
intro: Osbertia bartlettii, also known as Bartlett's sandwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Osbertia bartlettii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for a range of uses in traditional medicine.
